description: Welcome the New Year in style with our fashion-forward email template. Perfect for holiday promotions, this dynamic template showcases the latest trends for New Year's Eve and other seasonal events. Whether you're hosting a virtual fashion event or promoting beauty and personal care products for the festive season, this template effortlessly captures the spirit of the holiday and the glamour of Fashion Week. It's not just an email, it's an invitation to celebrate the New Year with the best in fashion. Ideal for those in the beauty, fashion, and events industries looking to make a bold statement this holiday season.
short_description: Welcome the New Year with our fashion-forward email template. Ideal for holiday promotions, showcasing New Year's Eve trends, and virtual fashion events. Perfect for beauty, fashion, and events industries looking to make a statement this season. Celebrate with the best in fashion.

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

html_data:
NEW YEARS

VIRTUAL PARADE

 

See the stunning, all-new 2021 collection. Featuring live musical performances.

 

BEGINS 7PM EDT, DECEMBER 31

 
GET ACCESS

Hansel’s unique style melds bold, heroic imagery with clean, wearable fashion.

Bev has taken the fashion world by storm, her eye-catching work is unmistakable.
